title: Got a Spare Trillion? Amazon AWS Glitch Leaves Consumers With Eye-Popping Bills
summary: A glitch at Amazon's cloud services division, Amazon Web Services (AWS), left consumers all over the world with bills that would bankrupt even Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
